text: “Truck” means every motor vehicle which is used for the transportation or delivery of goods with a body built and designed for that purpose.
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 484A
##### § 484A.305 — “Truck” defined.

“Truck” means every motor vehicle which is used for the transportation or delivery of goods with a body built and designed for that purpose.

subsections.text: “Truck” means every motor vehicle which is used for the transportation or delivery of goods with a body built and designed for that purpose.
